name: Scrap
description:
🧜‍♂️ | Prehistoric times call for prehistoric measures -- err, Scrap has to stop his pet megalodon from eating you. 7k thanks!

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 7K?!

That is a LOT!!! I truly cannot wrap my wrinkly brain around that size, nor the fact so many enjoy my merfolk/bots in general.

While my commission and requests are not currently open (Seriously, you would NOT believe how many bots I still have to do), I do have a sneaky little form for those who'd like to fill it out. (Yoinked from neenaw with permission)

ILY!!! have a good day, drink water, and take care of yourselves.

(Marked at giant bc he's 22 feet in length, idc if the size proportions are weird i do what i want /affectionate)
creator: gunko
